package rulefixtures

// scenario for error_string_comparison: `if err.Error() == "some error"` string comparison for error checking
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule479PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario479Positive(records []Rule479PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
